case_title: EULA TSIVIKAS VS. SAMUEL HAYWARD ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSIVIKAS, EULA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAYWARD, SAMUEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 587 O'FARRELL STREET #2, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
